item.title: [Segurança] Ghost CMS SQL injection flaw exploited in large-scale ClickFix campaign
item.description:
🚨 Ghost CMS SQL injection flaw exploited in large-scale ClickFix campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A large-scale campaign is exploiting a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-26980) in Ghost CMS to inject malicious JavaScript code that triggers ClickFix attack flows.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ghost-cms-sql-injection-flaw-exploited-in-large-scale-clickfix-campaign/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Week in review: GitHub breached via poisoned VS Code extension, critical NGINX flaw exploited - Help Net Security
item.description:
💣 Week in review: GitHub breached via poisoned VS Code extension, critical NGINX flaw exploited - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Nginx. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Teams exploit NFL leniency to troll Mike Vrabel during 2026 schedule release - MSN

item.title: [Segurança] Laravel Lang packages hijacked to deploy credential-stealing malware
item.description:
📰 Laravel Lang packages hijacked to deploy credential-stealing malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A supply chain attack targeting the Laravel Lang localization packages has exposed developers to a sophisticated credential-stealing malware campaign after attackers abused GitHub version tags to distribute malicious code through Composer packages.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/laravel-lang-packages-hijacked-to-deploy-credential-stealing-malware/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] The $uri$args concatenation in nginx configuration file present in Open Security Issue Management (OSIM) prior v2025.9.0 allows path traversal attacks via query parameters. - Endor Labs
item.description:
📰 The $uri$args concatenation in nginx configuration file present in Open Security Issue Management (OSIM) prior v2025.9.0 allows path traversal attacks via query parameters. - Endor Labs
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 5.9
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Nginx, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE10alV3aWxMdXpkazl0UElCeFdrM1c3ZzZuNXVudVNZMnpYYXhpdjFkY0VEWGs5UTc5SG93MkVaZmNua0w5bFBNN05ScnI1dmdOSUh0aHFZWnBJN0hGMWRHWHA1aw?oc=5
